executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Live red remains localized to the marketing owner loop: marketing-daily last timed out, the marketing runner bundle is stale/unhealthy, and marketing independent verification is fail-closed on momentum and workflow blockers.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Repair the marketing owner loop bundle and rerun its independent verifier before any full-green architecture claim.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing owner loop is still the live blocker
findings.mechanism: health_monitor_latest.json still shows marketing-daily timeout and marketing verifier blocker escalations; marketing_loop_independent_verification.json now adds that the runner bundle is stale relative to the refreshed workflow audit.
findings.root_cause: The remaining red state is owned by the marketing loop, not by architecture topology or verifier freshness logic.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun/repair the marketing runner bundle, clear momentum/workflow blockers, then obtain a fresh marketing independent pass artifact.

findings.title: Architecture independent verifier had a local runtime bug and was repaired this run
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_independent_verify.py referenced an undefined errors list on the loop-integrity path; it now records that condition under architecture_errors so the verifier can complete fail-closed instead of crashing when prerequisites are fresh.
findings.root_cause: Verifier bookkeeping used the wrong accumulator name in the live loop-integrity branch.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the corrected fail-closed path and re-run independent verification whenever architecture evidence is refreshed.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history still exists but is not live-topology drift
findings.mechanism: jobs.json still contains disabled historical entries while the live Gateway scheduler reports 20 enabled jobs and 0 disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are separate surfaces.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue reporting persisted disabled history separately from the live scheduler topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep the architecture verifier fail-closed on fresh prerequisite evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: False-green architecture signoff is worse than an honest localized red blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture verification completes reliably and does not silently pass on stale or contradictory evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair the marketing owner loop bundle and rerun its independent verifier
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live blockers are marketing-owned and still block full-green certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Marketing either turns healthy or stays honestly red with fresh evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Reopen full-green only after fresh marketing evidence passes
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture signoff stays localized and truthful.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Replaced the undefined loop-integrity error accumulator with architecture_errors so fresh verification can complete instead of crashing.
Reran competitor_analysis.py so market_intelligence_latest.json and the producer record are fresh again for architecture freshness checks.
Reran marketing workflow audit, marketing momentum watchdog, marketing independent verifier, and system health monitor to localize the remaining blocker with current evidence.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh healthy marketing independent signoff after the marketing runner bundle, momentum watchdog, and workflow blockers are cleared.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing owner loop remains red on runtime freshness and outcome health
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: marketing-daily timed out, the marketing independent verifier now also flags a stale runner bundle, and the workflow audit still reports needs_repair with flat primary-repo adoption.
